summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of FesaGlobal website focusing on header behavior, mobile responsiveness, globe interactions, and testimonial form functionality. All major features working correctly with excellent mobile optimization.

design_issues.issue: Form has Name and Photo upload fields, but missing Role, Location, and Story text area fields as mentioned in requirements
design_issues.note: Form has basic functionality but could be enhanced with additional fields

passed_tests: Hero section has NO header/navigation initially (both desktop and mobile)
Header appears after scrolling past 80% viewport on desktop
Header appears after scrolling past 80% viewport on mobile (confirmed working at 725px scroll)
Mobile responsive - globe resizes properly (280x280 on mobile vs 500x500 on desktop)
Touch interactions work on globe (mobile) - drag and rotation gestures functional
WhatsApp button works correctly with proper wa.me link
Email button works and navigates correctly
Mobile button layout is correct (stacked vertically with 56px gap)
Testimonial 'Share Your Story' button found and functional
Testimonial form has photo upload functionality
Testimonial form has name field and submit button
All sections mobile optimized - no horizontal scroll issues
Text readability excellent on mobile viewport
Mobile menu button appears and functions in header after scroll
Navigation items (Home, Services, Regions, About, Stories) all present and functional
Globe auto-rotation and manual interaction working smoothly
Responsive design maintains proper spacing and layout across viewports
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider enhancing testimonial form with Role, Location, and Story text area fields for complete user story submission as originally specified
